summary: Completed comprehensive testing of nexTalent labor market intelligence platform. Backend APIs working perfectly (100% success rate). Frontend React app with ECharts visualizations functioning well with minor UI issues.

ui_bugs.issue: One toggle button not clickable (element not visible)
Skill input field has restrictions preventing manual text entry

passed_tests: Backend API health check (12/12 endpoints working)
Homepage loads with hero section, feature cards, stats
Navbar navigation to all 5 main pages (/search, /skills, /trends, /companies, /skills-gap)
Job Search: text prompt mode, CV upload toggle, offer comparison
Skills Dashboard: ECharts bar chart rendering, skills table with demand/growth data
Role Trends: line charts, salary charts, role detail tabs working
Company Comparison: radar charts, salary charts, company filter buttons
Skills Gap: role selection, skill suggestions, analysis with gauge + radar charts
Login page: form submission and authentication working
All mocked APIs returning proper data structure
